_comment: Turnkey prompt list for the art selection sweep. Generator concatenates <desc> + style_suffix, fires <rolls> rolls per entry, pulls into art_source/pixellab_<date>/sweep/<key>_<n>.png, and build.py renders them as per-asset gallery rows (rolls side by side) for picking. Style is LOCKED; this is selection, not exploration. See docs/art/ART_PRODUCTION_PLAN.md.
style_suffix: , warm cozy lived-in palette with soft grime, bold heavy black outline, chunky graphic pixel art, deep contrast shadows, cartoony retro RPG, symmetrical straight-on centered low top-down view, lit from top-left

props.desc: a sleek high-end megacorp office desk with a large clean monitor
a decent modern office swivel chair
a sleek high-end ergonomic executive office chair
a sleek modern flat widescreen computer monitor, powered on with a glowing screen
a sleek high-end black desktop computer tower with subtle lights
a large glowing compute server cluster, many blinking racks and cables
a grimy cheap office kitchenette counter with a sink and clutter
a clean tidy office kitchenette counter with a sink
a grey metal office filing cabinet with drawers
a bulky office printer and copier machine
an office trash can with some recycling
a long office meeting table with a few chairs
an office water cooler dispenser with a large water bottle on top
a standing office coat rack with a couple of neatly hung coats

environment.desc: a seamless tileable office carpet floor texture tile
a seamless tileable office linoleum floor texture tile
a seamless tileable bare concrete floor texture tile
a grimy dated office wall segment with scuffs
a clean plain office wall segment
an office window looking out on a clear bright sky
an office window looking out on a dark stormy sky with rain
an office window looking out on an ominous doomy red-purple apocalyptic sky

cats_body_type_quadruped_template_cat.desc: an eerie eldritch doom cat, glowing eyes, wisps of smoke, wrong-angled, unsettling
a strange purple end-state doom cat, faintly glowing, otherworldly

characters_use_create_character.desc: a young Black woman with short natural hair and a smart casual outfit, AI safety researcher
an older woman team lead with grey hair in a bun and a blazer, AI safety researcher
a person using a wheelchair, casual jumper, AI safety researcher
a visibly eccentric genius with wild hair and mismatched clothes, AI safety researcher
a shadowed silhouetted operator figure in a high-backed chair, face hidden, ominous, side view
characters_use_create_character.note: founder, not a floor worker; may want side view not low-top-down
